canonical.title: Obsidian 2026: low-friction capture and AI-assisted backfill

parent.title: Upgrading a personal Obsidian workflow in 2026

siblings.title: Frontmatter & tagging schemas for extraction
siblings.summary: How to design Obsidian YAML frontmatter and tag taxonomies in 2026 so external tools can reliably extract, query, and validate the metadata.

siblings.title: Knowledge-base patterns for a technical vault
siblings.summary: What actually works for a technical Obsidian vault in 2026: hybrid PARA+Zettel skeleton, Properties-first metadata, daily-note capture, MOCs over deep folders, and a small high-value plugin set.

siblings.title: Automated media tracking (books / movies / series)
siblings.summary: Pick a tracking hub per medium (Hardcover for books, Simkl for film/TV), automate capture with Readwise + CrossWatch, and pull into Obsidian via Media DB or Book Search plugins.

siblings.title: Selective publishing to GitHub Pages or equivalents
siblings.summary: Pick the opt-in (whitelist) frontmatter pattern over draft-style opt-out; Quartz + ExplicitPublish is the closest free match to Obsidian Publish.

siblings.title: AI plugins for in-vault retrieval & summarization
siblings.summary: Pick Smart Connections for local-first retrieval, Copilot for polished vault chat, Smart Composer for Cursor-style edits, Khoj for cross-device self-hosted second-brain.

sources.title: github.com/chhoumann/quickadd
sources.claim: QuickAdd 2.2k★ v2.12.0 (Mar 5 2026) — Captures, Templates, Macros, Multi choices.

sources.title: quickadd.obsidian.guide — CaptureChoice
sources.claim: QuickAdd's Capture choice appends content to predefined files like today's daily note under a section.

sources.title: github.com/SilentVoid13/Templater
sources.claim: Templater 4.9k★ v2.20.0 (Apr 29 2026) — JS execution + dynamic variables in templates.

sources.title: Templater settings
sources.claim: Templater binds templates to hotkeys via Template Hotkeys (hidden until 'Trigger Template on new file creation' enabled).

sources.title: github.com/liamcain/obsidian-periodic-notes
sources.claim: Periodic Notes 1.3k★ — last release v1.0.0-beta.3 (Apr 2022); widely treated as unmaintained.

sources.title: forum.obsidian.md — Journals plugin
sources.claim: Journals (srg-kostyrko) is the actively-maintained 2025/2026 Periodic Notes replacement; daily→yearly + interval journals + bulk import.

sources.title: dsebastien.net — must-have Obsidian plugins 2026
sources.claim: 2026 list pairs QuickAdd for capture with Templater for note typing; Rollover Daily Todos + Auto Note Mover for inbox processing.

sources.title: obsidian.rocks — quick capture
sources.claim: Power-user pattern: QuickAdd + Global Hotkeys plugin, Ctrl+Alt+A as a common trigger; optionally Alfred/ULauncher.

sources.title: forum.obsidian.md — AutoHotkey QuickAdd
sources.claim: Windows AutoHotkey script bound to Ctrl+Alt+V activates Obsidian and forwards Ctrl+Alt+C into QuickAdd's capture window.

sources.title: forum.obsidian.md — quick capture and inbox processing
sources.claim: Inbox-processing pattern: Advanced URI + Templater + Hotkeys for Templates with Opt+A/D/M for archive/trash/move per fleeting note.

sources.title: github.com/Quorafind/Obsidian-Thino
sources.claim: Thino 1.3k★ v3.0.10 (Apr 2026) — Twitter-style timestamped capture; closed-source from v2.0.0 with paid pro.

sources.title: obsibrain — Obsidian daily notes
sources.claim: Today's daily note acts as central inbox; processing happens at review time rather than capture time.

sources.title: obsidian.md — mobile v1.12.4
sources.claim: Mobile 1.12 (Feb 27 2026): native iOS Share extension, 'Bookmark Link' Shortcut, 'Unique note' long-press action.

sources.title: obsidian.md — mobile v1.11.4
sources.claim: Mobile 1.11 (Jan 2026): iOS Lock Screen / Control Center / Home Screen widgets, Android widgets + Quick Settings Tile, Siri 'Capture using Obsidian'.

sources.title: obsidian.md/roadmap
sources.claim: Public roadmap: mobile UI refresh and startup-time work in flight, but no further capture-specific items remain.

sources.title: practicalpkm — 2026 Obsidian Report Card
sources.claim: 2026 Report Card scores mobile 3.1/5: widget/Shortcut taps still cold-start the full vault — 'still awkward and kludgy'.

sources.title: Actions for Obsidian (App Store)
sources.claim: Carlo Zottmann's Actions for Obsidian (iOS 18.4+) — 40+ Shortcuts actions: append, prepend, create-from-template, fetch frontmatter.

sources.title: forum.obsidian.md — Quick Draft
sources.claim: Quick Draft — free Android/iOS companion: text/voice/image capture, OCR, date-formatted file paths, template wrapping, Siri shortcuts.

sources.title: thesweetsetup — Drafts to Obsidian
sources.claim: Drafts since v28 Bookmarks writes Markdown into iCloud-stored vault without launching Obsidian; Watch complication.

sources.title: forum.obsidian.md — Tasker quick capture
sources.claim: Android Tasker writes timestamped Markdown directly into vault folder; sync only fires when Obsidian opens.

sources.title: forum.obsidian.md — Android home-screen widget
sources.claim: Harshil Chordia's open-source widget renders pinned notes with interactive checkboxes + Quick Capture button (no app open).

sources.title: nullpat.ch — quick capture
sources.claim: Two-tier flow: iOS Shortcut popup appending date+#QuickNotes for short thoughts; Drafts fallback for longer captures.

sources.title: forum.obsidian.md — Apple Watch app
sources.claim: No first-party Obsidian Watch app in 2026; workarounds: Drafts complication, Siri Shortcuts via iCloud, third-party Uplink.

sources.title: fleetingnotes.app — quick notes into Obsidian
sources.claim: Fleeting Notes — Android-first scratch-note frontend, frequent Reddit/forum recommendation.

sources.title: github.com/obsidianmd/obsidian-clipper
sources.claim: Obsidian Web Clipper 4.1k★ v1.6.2 (Apr 23 2026) — official cross-browser extension.

sources.title: obsidian.md/clipper
sources.claim: Web Clipper saves to local Markdown; pre-built templates for articles, recipes, references, academic papers.

sources.title: help.obsidian.md — Interpreter
sources.claim: Interpreter sends page context + template prompts to selected LLM (BYO Claude/GPT/Gemini/local) using {{prompt}} syntax.

sources.title: forum.obsidian.md — replacing Omnivore
sources.claim: Post-Omnivore: Web Clipper for archival + Raindrop.io as triage inbox (Raindrop does not store full Markdown).

sources.title: gleamr — Omnivore shut down
sources.claim: Omnivore shut down November 2024 after ElevenLabs acquihire; obsidian-omnivore plugin's API is offline.

sources.title: github.com/readwiseio/obsidian-readwise
sources.claim: Official Readwise plugin (335★) — auto-exports Kindle/Apple Books/Pocket/Twitter/PDFs/Reader highlights with Jinja2 templating.

sources.title: stefanimhoff — Readwise + AI
sources.claim: Readwise V2 added mobile sync (iOS/Android) and an MCP server callable from Raycast or Claude.

sources.title: github.com/deathau/markdownload
sources.claim: MarkDownload 3.8k★ — generic page→Markdown via Advanced Obsidian URI; lightweight fallback when Web Clipper templates don't fit.

sources.title: github.com/getmatterapp/obsidian-matter
sources.claim: Matter Obsidian plugin 128★ last release v1.1.4 (Nov 2022) — appears inactive; 19 open issues.

sources.title: readless — Matter pricing 2026
sources.claim: Matter Premium $60/yr — closest still-maintained Omnivore equivalent; newsletter sync + AI Co-Reader + unlimited highlights.

sources.title: github.com/weichenw/obsidian-hypothesis-plugin
sources.claim: obsidian-hypothesis-plugin 270★ — syncs Hypothes.is web annotations into vault on startup or manually.

sources.title: github.com/lindylearn/obsidian-annotations
sources.claim: lindylearn fork — bi-directional Hypothes.is sync; vault edits propagate back to web annotations.

sources.title: email2obsidian.com
sources.claim: Email2Obsidian — forwarding alias model; free 10 lifetime emails, $2.49/mo Starter for 300 monthly emails.

sources.title: obsidianstats — TaskRobin
sources.claim: TaskRobin Email Sync — archives forwarded emails + attachments into vault via secure forwarding alias.

sources.title: github.com/joethei/obsidian-rss
sources.claim: RSS Reader plugin (joethei) 468★ archived August 25 2025 — last release v1.2.2 (June 2022).

sources.title: github.com/amatya-aditya/obsidian-rss-dashboard
sources.claim: RSS Dashboard 499★ — aggregates RSS + YouTube + podcasts with smart tagging and embedded media playback.

sources.title: danielprindii — read-it-later after Omnivore
sources.claim: Self-hosted Wallabag — recommended privacy-conscious Omnivore replacement.

sources.title: github.com/nikdanilov/whisper-obsidian-plugin
sources.claim: nikdanilov whisper-obsidian-plugin 350★ v1.9.1 (Apr 2026) — OpenAI/Groq/Azure/Ollama/LM Studio; hotkey recording (Alt+Q); LLM post-processing.

sources.title: github.com/djmango/obsidian-transcription
sources.claim: djmango/obsidian-transcription 222★ — local Whisper + cloud; last release v3.4.0 (Apr 2024) — stagnant.

sources.title: github.com/Mossy1022/Smart-Memos
sources.claim: Smart Memos 79★ — OpenAI-only one-shot transcript+summary+expansion; local-model support on roadmap.

sources.title: xda — voice notes PC
sources.claim: OpenAI Whisper API ~$1 per 2h45m audio with strong accent handling; local whisper.cpp 16GB RAM floor.

sources.title: novascribe — Whisper accuracy
sources.claim: Whisper Large-v3 hits 2.7% WER on clean English / 8-12% on real-world / 8-15% on accented.

sources.title: forum.obsidian.md — voice memo AI workflow
sources.claim: 2026 r/ObsidianMD pipeline: voice memo → transcription → AI summary → structured note → vault.

sources.title: forum.obsidian.md — iPhone voice memo
sources.claim: iOS Shortcuts + RoutineHub piping Voice Memos through Whisper (cloud or local Aiko) and ChatGPT to iCloud → vault.

sources.title: plaud — iPhone Voice Memos transcription
sources.claim: iOS 18+ Voice Memos on-device transcription on iPhone 12+ — 85-90% accuracy on clean single-speaker.

sources.title: github.com/jonashaefele/audiopen-obsidian
sources.claim: AudioPen → Obsidian bridge 7★ — webhooks with templated {title}/{body}/{orig_transcript}.

sources.title: github.com/vincentbavitz/obsidian-vox
sources.claim: Vox 78★ — folder-watcher with filename-prefix metadata tokens; dev's free server (100/day); no API keys needed.

sources.title: wisprflow.ai — Obsidian
sources.claim: Wispr Flow — system-wide voice keyboard; vendor claims ~220 wpm vs 45 wpm typing (~4×).

sources.title: github.com/niehu2018/obsidian-ai-tagger-universe
sources.claim: AI Tagger Universe 84★ v1.0.17 (Mar 2026) — batch tag whole vault; nested hierarchical tags into frontmatter; 15+ providers.

sources.title: github.com/brianpetro/obsidian-smart-connections
sources.claim: Smart Connections 4.9k★ v4.3.0 (Apr 2026) — semantic discovery via local embeddings; source-available 'Smart Plugins License'.

sources.title: Smart Connections — pricing concerns
sources.claim: Smart Connections users in 2026 raised concerns about '10-20x typical paid Obsidian plugin pricing' and license switch without notification.

sources.title: github.com/logancyang/obsidian-copilot
sources.claim: Copilot for Obsidian 6.8k★ v3.2.8 (Apr 29 2026) — agentic chat + vault-wide RAG + Composer V2; Plus tier paid via Brevilabs.

sources.title: Copilot — RELEASES.md
sources.claim: Copilot 2026: web-tab reading, YouTube/web clipper slash commands, Composer V2 with side-by-side diffs, 128k auto-compact, Bases support.

sources.title: github.com/nhaouari/obsidian-textgenerator-plugin
sources.claim: Text Generator 1.9k★ v0.8.7 (Apr 27 2026) — template-driven generation; OpenAI/Anthropic/Gemini/HuggingFace/local; gpt-5/thinking.

sources.title: github.com/Nexus-JPF/note-companion
sources.claim: Note Companion 832★ v3.6.18 (Apr 27 2026) — folder/tag/title/template suggestions; inbox-automation batch mode; desktop-only.

sources.title: obsidianstats — metadata-auto-classifier
sources.claim: Metadata Auto Classifier 52★ v1.12.9 (Apr 2026) — OpenAI GPT only; auto-classifies tags + arbitrary frontmatter fields.

sources.title: makeuseof — local LLM organize Obsidian
sources.claim: AI Tagger Universe + Auto Note Mover + Gemma 3 12B (LM Studio) retro-tagged hundreds of existing notes in <1h setup.

sources.title: aitooldiscovery — Obsidian Reddit
sources.claim: 2026 r/ObsidianMD splits AI picks across three lanes: Smart Composer (writing), Smart Connections (search), Copilot (RAG chat).

sources.title: systemsculpt — best Obsidian AI plugins 2026
sources.claim: Note Companion strongest 'when the job is turning chaos into organized notes'; new entrants: Obsilo Agent (55+ tools), Sonar (local-first).

sources.title: obsidianstats — LLM Tagger
sources.claim: LLM Tagger — Ollama-only; auto-applies tags to newly created or modified notes; lighter alternative to AI Tagger Universe.

sources.title: github.com/HananoshikaYomaru/Obsidian-Frontmatter-Generator
sources.claim: Frontmatter Generator 46★ — non-AI deterministic JS/JSON template fallback; whole-vault and per-folder commands.

sources.title: Copilot — local_copilot.md
sources.claim: Copilot supports Ollama + LM Studio; OLLAMA_ORIGINS=app://obsidian.md* bypasses CORS; pull nomic-embed-text or mxbai-embed-large for offline RAG.

sources.title: smartconnections.app
sources.claim: Smart Connections — embeddings created locally by default; notes stay on machine unless cloud explicitly enabled.

sources.title: grokipedia — Smart Connections
sources.claim: Smart Connections — 786,090 community plugin downloads (Jan 2026), ~4,400 GitHub stars.

sources.title: localaimaster — best Ollama models
sources.claim: Picks: Llama 3.3 70B (40GB VRAM, 86.0 MMLU) top quality; Qwen 2.5 32B (20GB VRAM, 83.2 MMLU) best mid-range; Llama 3.2 8B default.

sources.title: localaimaster — best 8GB models
sources.claim: On 8GB RAM: Mistral 7B v0.3 for email/meeting summaries; Llama 3.1 8B for summarization + light coding (6GB VRAM).

sources.title: aithinkerlab — llama.cpp 100K
sources.claim: llama.cpp crossed 100K GitHub stars March 2026 with 700+ contributors and 15K+ forks — faster than PyTorch (~7y) or TensorFlow (~8y).

sources.title: morphllm — llama.cpp vs Ollama
sources.claim: Ollama wraps llama.cpp inference backend in a friendlier shell; crossed 110K GitHub stars by March 2026 vs ~100K for llama.cpp.

sources.title: localaimaster — Mac local AI setup
sources.claim: Apple Silicon: M1/M2/M3/M4 base 15-28 tok/s on 8B models; M3 Pro/Max 28-35 tok/s on Llama 3.1 8B (unified memory).

sources.title: ollama.com/blog/mlx
sources.claim: Ollama on Apple Silicon now built on MLX framework leveraging unified memory across CPU/GPU/Neural Engine.

sources.title: github.com/ggml-org/whisper.cpp
sources.claim: whisper.cpp 49k★ — C/C++ port of OpenAI Whisper under ggml-org; offline GPU-accelerated speech-to-text.

sources.title: forum.obsidian.md — Apple Intelligence Writing Tools
sources.claim: Apple Intelligence Writing Tools partially exposed in Obsidian Edit menu on macOS 15.1+ (M-series, AI enabled).

sources.title: github.com/apple/python-apple-fm-sdk
sources.claim: Apple ships official Python bindings (python-apple-fm-sdk 1.0k★) to on-device Foundation Models powering Apple Intelligence.

sources.title: libertify — Apple Foundation Models 2025
sources.claim: Apple Foundation Models — Swift-centric API exposing guided generation, constrained tool calling, LoRA adapter fine-tuning.

sources.title: tech-insider — LM Studio vs Ollama 2026
sources.claim: LM Studio 2026 — closed-source GUI with HuggingFace browser; OpenAI-compatible inference server on localhost:1234/v1.

sources.title: xda — local LLM with Obsidian
sources.claim: Privacy case for local LLMs in Obsidian: cloud doesn't see notes, runs offline, no per-token cost once model downloaded.
